fts_queries.description: Primary user full name — PersonCard should rank in top 3
Verbatim phrase from a Mint notification email_message summary in hf-archives-seed

graph_queries.description: 2-hop neighborhood from primary user PersonCard (always in slice). Phase 6 Tier 1: assert wikilink edges exist and are tagged with edge_type.

graph_queries.anchor_rel_path: PLACEHOLDER: pick a card path with both deterministic and seed-link edges via the SQL in phase_6 plan Step 3b
graph_queries.description: Phase 6 Tier 1: anchor with mixed deterministic + applied seed-link edges. Until the slice has applied seed-link promotions, this entry is intentionally PLACEHOLDER and run_behavioral_checks will report it as failed; populate `anchor_rel_path` after the seed-link workers run.
Phase 6.5: Uber Eats finance card -> reconciled meal_order card via finance_reconciles edge. Validates MODULE_FINANCE_RECONCILE TIER_SOURCE_EMAIL / TIER_HIGH.
Phase 6.5: Handlery Union Square SF accommodation -> part_of_trip -> flight/car_rental cluster. Validates MODULE_TRIP_CLUSTER IATA-city + date-window predicate.
Phase 6.5: Endaoment-Gitcoin meeting transcript -> calendar_event via ical_uid or title+start_at match. Validates MODULE_MEETING_ARTIFACT.

semantic_queries.query: PLACEHOLDER: restaurant name from a meal_order card in the slice
semantic_queries.description: Restaurant name finds meal_order via semantic search

semantic_queries.query: PLACEHOLDER: destination airport from a flight card in the slice
semantic_queries.description: Airport code finds flight via semantic search

semantic_queries.query: PLACEHOLDER: pickup/dropoff from a ride card in the slice
semantic_queries.description: Route description finds ride via semantic search
Phase 6.5: DoorDash merchant name should retrieve both the finance charge and the meal_order via finance_reconciles edge
Phase 6.5: SF hotel name; with part_of_trip edges promoted, connected flights and car_rentals should co-rank
Phase 6.5: meeting title; transcript + calendar_event should co-rank via transcript_has_calendar_event edge
